name: QE / E2E testing ICP (Kodus)
description: Companies with quality/automation pain on customer-facing products — not headcount alone.

criteria.label: Open QA Automation / SDET role
criteria.pass_hint: Hiring QA Automation, SDET, or SEIT with E2E/CI/flaky mentions

criteria.label: Test suite rebuild / rescue / flaky debt
criteria.pass_hint: Role or content about rebuilding, recovering, or owning a flaky/unreliable suite

criteria.label: Engineering growth without QA growth
criteria.pass_hint: Several open eng roles and zero QA/SDET roles

criteria.label: AI features entering production
criteria.pass_hint: Building customer-facing AI/LLM features that need evals/regression

criteria.label: Important release or launch
criteria.pass_hint: Recent launch, major release, or high ship cadence

criteria.label: Migration or redesign
criteria.pass_hint: Platform rewrite, migration, redesign, or rearchitecture

criteria.label: Compliance / enterprise pressure
criteria.pass_hint: SOC2, HIPAA, PCI, enterprise security, or enterprise sales hiring

criteria.label: Public bugs / incidents / support pressure
criteria.pass_hint: Public outages, status incidents, or recurring bug complaints

criteria.label: Customer-facing B2B product
criteria.pass_hint: B2B SaaS with demo/pricing/workspaces used by customers

criteria.label: Flows with money, access, permissions, or data
criteria.pass_hint: Billing, RBAC, SSO, permissions, sensitive data, or operational workflows

criteria.label: Enough product complexity to need context
criteria.pass_hint: Multi-role, integrations, onboarding, multi-step workflows

criteria.label: Fintech / health / marketplace / commerce / workflow SaaS
criteria.pass_hint: Industry or product category matches high-pain verticals

criteria.label: Roughly mid-size engineering org (not tiny, not mega)
criteria.pass_hint: Signals of ~10–50 eng or similar scale; not a sole founder toy app

criteria.label: Ships to production multiple times a week
criteria.pass_hint: Evidence of frequent releases: active changelog, weekly release notes, CD/deploy-per-day culture mentioned in postings or eng blog

criteria.label: Wants cheap manual test labor only
criteria.pass_hint: ANTI: hiring only for manual test-case factories / cheap headcount

criteria.label: Already mature QE / stable E2E
criteria.pass_hint: ANTI: strong mature QE org with healthy suite and no pain signals

criteria.label: Simple or very stable product / low cost of failure
criteria.pass_hint: ANTI: trivial product, few users, low failure cost

criteria.label: Mobile native as central need
criteria.pass_hint: ANTI: primary product is native mobile with little web SaaS surface

criteria.label: Wants full quality ownership outsourced
criteria.pass_hint: ANTI: seeking a vendor to own all quality responsibility

criteria.label: Software factory / consultancy / agency (sells dev hours, not a product)
criteria.pass_hint: ANTI: primary business is selling development services, staff augmentation, outsourcing, consulting or agency work ('fábrica de software', 'consultoria', 'alocação', 'squad as a service') instead of its own product

criteria.label: Wants pentest, security audit or 24/7 on-call
criteria.pass_hint: ANTI: what they need is penetration testing, security auditing or 24/7 incident on-call coverage rather than quality engineering
